## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] **I wrote and understand every line of this change. It is not vibe-coded — I can explain how and why it works.**
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets` passes with no warnings (for Rust changes).
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (for frontend changes).
- [ ] I tested this change in the running app.
- [ ] My change follows the project's conventions (theme tokens, no hardcoded colors, focused commits).
